summary: Comprehensive testing of Sarvbhasa platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional with real Sarvam integration, JWT auth, and Stripe payments. Frontend fully functional with tricolor theme, auth flows, and all navigation working. Translation functionality confirmed working via backend tests. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: Backend health check (200 OK)
User registration with unique email (TestBot)
Admin login with admin@sarvbhasa.com
JWT auth with httpOnly cookies
Google OAuth endpoint exists and validates session_id
Real Sarvam API translation (Hello -> नमस्कार)
Chat API with translation response and thread support
Chat threads endpoint returns user conversations
Translation history endpoint returns user translations
Stripe payment checkout (₹499/month)
Auth protection (401 for unauthenticated)
Landing page with tricolor gradient and Hindi text
Experience Sarvbhasa CTA transition to main app
Sidebar navigation with all required items (Home, New Chat, Chat, Text Translate, Speech to Text, Translation History, Upgrade to Premium)
Auth modal with Sign In/Create Account tabs
Social buttons (Google functional, Twitter/Telegram visual)
Admin login flow successful
Page navigation to Chat, Text Translate, Translation History, Upgrade
Chat interface with language selection and translate button
Text Translate page with source/target text areas
Translation History page with search functionality
Upgrade page with ₹499 Premium pricing
No Emergent branding visible anywhere
Chat history sidebar with conversation threads
New Chat button functionality
Language background images present and less blurred
Tricolor theme throughout the application
